steps.title: Introduce the example
steps.content: The clause "many are still well known" is complete. The following sentence element gives an example: Fama Diagne Sène is a celebrated playwright from Senegal.

steps.title: Use example punctuation
steps.content: Choice B uses "and," but the second clause is an example rather than a parallel addition. Choice C creates a comma splice. Choice D fuses two clauses with no punctuation. A colon after a complete clause can introduce the example. The answer is A.
